calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CHERLENE CUN, TEL. NO. 1-415-310-3802, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHARLENE CUN'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption from wage garnishment is granted. Defendant's financial statement demonstrates that the difference between her monthly income and monthly expenses is insubstantial and therefore her wages are exempt. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'s Hearing On Defendant Charlene Cun's Claim Of Exemption is Off calendar. The wage garnishment was terminated by the Sheriff on February 5, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar
